scripts.build: bun run check && bun run scripts/build.ts
scripts.build:linux-x64: bun run check && bun run scripts/build.ts bun-linux-x64-baseline
scripts.build:linux-arm64: bun run check && bun run scripts/build.ts bun-linux-arm64
scripts.build:windows-x64: bun run check && bun run scripts/build.ts bun-windows-x64-baseline
scripts.build:darwin-x64: bun run check && bun run scripts/build.ts bun-darwin-x64
scripts.build:darwin-arm64: bun run check && bun run scripts/build.ts bun-darwin-arm64
scripts.build:all: bun run check && bun run scripts/build.ts bun-linux-x64-baseline bun-linux-arm64 bun-windows-x64-baseline bun-darwin-x64 bun-darwin-arm64
